title: Structs, Methods, Method Sets, Embedding, and Composition · Execution Trace: Embedding Promotion
summary: A job scheduler needs explicit domain records, validated transitions, method behavior, and composition without accidental promotion. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go embedding promotion increment in a validated job-domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use embedding for promotion only after resolving name collisions, initialization, API exposure, and substitution limits.
Predict method sets, implicit address-taking, interface satisfaction, and behavior of named pointer and value types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
